name: Oyster Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the saltine crumbs and melted butter.
2. Spread about one-third of this mixture in an 8-inch pie plate.
3. Drain the oysters, reserving 1/4 cup of the liquid, and spread half over the crumbs.
4. Use another third of the crumbs to make a second layer, then spread the remaining oysters over it.
5. Mix the cream, oyster liquid, and Worcestershire sauce together.
6. Pour this mixture over the oysters.
7. Top with the remaining crumbs.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until crusty.
